Bash(python3 -c "
from prompt_toolkit.formatted_text import FormattedText

ft = FormattedText\([\('', 'Table'\)]\)
print\(f'type: {type\(ft\)}'\)
print\(f'value: {ft}'\)
print\(f'equal to \\"Table\\": {ft == \\"Table\\"}'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
from prompt_toolkit.formatted_text import FormattedText

ft = FormattedText\([\('', 'Table'\)]\)
print\(f'methods: {[m for m in dir\(ft\) if not m.startswith\(\\"_\\"\)]}'\)
print\(f'formatted_text: {ft.formatted_text}'\)
print\(f'formatted_text[0][1]: {ft.formatted_text[0][1]}'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
from prompt_toolkit.formatted_text import FormattedText

ft = FormattedText\([\('', 'Table'\)]\)
print\(f'list: {list\(ft\)}'\)
print\(f'[0][1]: {ft[0][1]}'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
text = 'SELECT * FROM users WHERE na'
cursor_position = 28
prefix_upper = text[:cursor_position].upper\(\)
print\(f'prefix_upper: \\"{prefix_upper}\\"'\)
print\(f'\\"WHERE \\" in prefix: {\\"WHERE \\" in prefix_upper}'\)
print\(f'length: {len\(text\)}'\)
print\(f'text[cursor_position]: \\"{text[cursor_position] if cursor_position < len\(text\) else \\"END\\"}\\"'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
prefix_upper = 'SELECT * FROM USERS WHERE NA'
kw = 'SELECT '
print\(f'\\"{kw}\\" in \\"{prefix_upper}\\": {kw in prefix_upper}'\)

kw2 = 'WHERE '
print\(f'\\"{kw2}\\" in \\"{prefix_upper}\\": {kw2 in prefix_upper}'\)
")
